scripts.build:backend: npm run build:api && npm run build:worker
scripts.test:backend: npm run test:api && npm run test:worker
scripts.compose:up: bash -lc 'ENV_FILE=${EMAILHUB_ENV_FILE:-.env}; [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] || ENV_FILE=.env.example; docker compose --env-file "$ENV_FILE" -f infra/docker-compose.yml up --build'
scripts.compose:up:detached: bash -lc 'ENV_FILE=${EMAILHUB_ENV_FILE:-.env}; [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] || ENV_FILE=.env.example; docker compose --env-file "$ENV_FILE" -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d --build'
scripts.compose:up:prod: bash -lc 'ENV_FILE=${EMAILHUB_ENV_FILE:-.env}; [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] || ENV_FILE=.env.example; EMAILHUB_ENV_FILE="$ENV_FILE" npm run verify:emailengine-launch:env && docker compose --env-file "$ENV_FILE" -f infra/docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker-compose.prod.yml up --build'
scripts.compose:up:prod:detached: bash -lc 'ENV_FILE=${EMAILHUB_ENV_FILE:-.env}; [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] || ENV_FILE=.env.example; EMAILHUB_ENV_FILE="$ENV_FILE" npm run verify:emailengine-launch:env && docker compose --env-file "$ENV_FILE" -f infra/docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker-compose.prod.yml up -d --build'
scripts.compose:config:prod: bash -lc 'ENV_FILE=${EMAILHUB_ENV_FILE:-.env}; [ -f "$ENV_FILE" ] || ENV_FILE=.env.example; docker compose --env-file "$ENV_FILE" -f infra/docker-compose.yml -f infra/docker-compose.prod.yml config >/dev/null'
scripts.verify:emailengine-launch:offline: npm run build:backend && npm run test:backend && npm run build && npm test && npm run stress:sync-queue:heavy && npm run compose:config:prod
scripts.verify:emailengine-launch:live: npm run verify:emailengine-launch:env && npm run verify:emailengine-live && npm run verify:emailengine-launch:docker-health && npm run smoke:emailengine-webhook
scripts.verify:emailengine-launch:greenmail: npm run smoke:imap-smtp-onboarding && npm run smoke:emailengine-real-webhook && npm run smoke:emailengine-send && npm run smoke:emailengine-attachment-download && npm run smoke:emailengine-mail-action
scripts.verify:emailengine-launch:core: npm run verify:emailengine-launch:offline && npm run verify:emailengine-launch:live
scripts.verify:emailengine-launch: npm run verify:emailengine-launch:core && npm run verify:emailengine-launch:strict-db && npm run verify:emailengine-launch:greenmail
scripts.stress:sync-queue: npm run build:worker && npm run stress:sync-queue -w apps/worker-node --
scripts.stress:sync-queue:heavy: npm run build:worker && npm run stress:sync-queue -w apps/worker-node -- --accounts=64 --jobs-per-account=200 --workers=128 --work-delay-ms=1
scripts.lint: npm run lint:file-size && npm run lint -w apps/web
